title: VICTORY OVER CHILD ABUSE CAMPS - 211info
text: THE HEALING CIRCLE INC VICTORY OVER CHILD ABUSE CAMPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides two annual camps, an overnight and a day camp, that are separated by gender. 1054 Exchange Street Suite A Astoria, OR 97103 Eligibility: Children who are survivors of sexual abuse, a court case is not required. Priority is given to Clatsop County residents and returning campers. Most campers are between ages 6-18. Children who are outside age range can be accommodated on a case-by-case basis. Hours: Varies Email (503) 468-2488 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (503) 468-2488 Call or text Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information or for questions about specific camp dates and times FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Clatop, Columbia, Multmomah, and Tillamook Counties SITE HOURS: No standard hours Services: Camps * Child Abuse Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - MENTORING PROGRAM VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOCA CAMPS VOLUNTEER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. THE HEALING CIRCLE INC
